$comment: MCP manifest for vibe4trading-openclaw-skill. Server implements MCP initialize/tools-list/tools-call over stdio (Content-Length framed and newline-delimited). Register in opencode.json: { "openclaw-trading": { "type": "local", "command": ["bun", "run", "src/mcp-server.ts"], "timeout": 30000 } }
name: openclaw-trading
description: OpenClaw vibe4trading skill MCP server — wallet creation with one-time mnemonic display, onboarding/deposit, override reset, token setup, trading lifecycle, status, and trade history

tools.name: create_wallet
tools.description: Create a new BIP-39 wallet. Returns the address and mnemonic for one-time display. The mnemonic is shown exactly once; call confirm_backup after the operator has recorded it.

tools.name: confirm_backup
tools.description: Confirm that the operator has backed up the mnemonic. Must be called after create_wallet displayed the mnemonic. After confirmation, the mnemonic is never shown again via this tool.

tools.name: recover_mnemonic
tools.description: Deliberate local recovery: re-read the mnemonic from the desktop file. Only works if the file exists and has 0600 permissions.

tools.name: get_onboarding_status
tools.description: Check wallet funding status: combined USDC + USDT stablecoin balance, ETH gas, bridge cap headroom, and readiness to deposit. Returns bootstrap guidance when runtime state has not been initialized yet. USDT shortfall is auto-converted to USDC before bridging.

tools.name: deposit_to_hyperliquid
tools.description: Initiate a USDC bridge deposit from Arbitrum into Hyperliquid. Auto-converts USDT to USDC when native USDC is insufficient. Reads the local mnemonic to sign the transaction. Checks preflight balances, cap headroom, and minimum bridge amount before submitting.

amountUsdc.description: USDC amount to bridge. Omit to bridge the maximum available.

tools.name: reset_override_phrase
tools.description: Clear persisted override-phrase acceptance without altering cumulative bridge history. Future over-cap decisions require fresh operator consent again.

tools.name: set_v4t_token
tools.description: Persist or clear the vibe4trading bot token in runtime state. The token authenticates suggestion API requests.

token.description: The vibe4trading bot token to persist, or null to clear it.

tools.name: start_trading
tools.description: Arm trading for OpenClaw cron-managed execution at fixed :30 UTC intervals. Runs startup reconciliation against Hyperliquid exchange state and sets status to running. On mainnet, requires prior acknowledge_live_trading consent. Safe to call when already running (re-reconciles).

tools.name: stop_trading
tools.description: Emergency halt: cancel all open Hyperliquid orders, clear the dead-man switch, set status to halted. Does not close or flatten open positions. Further ticks are refused until start_trading re-arms trading.

tools.name: get_tick_context
tools.description: Return the current tick preview context: persisted trading selection, onboarding/funding state, hold reasons, agents.md summary, suggestion request/result, and allowed order styles before execution. Returns bootstrap guidance when runtime state has not been initialized yet.

slotId.description: Optional canonical tick slot override (hh:30 UTC) for previewing a specific slot.

action.description: Required explicit execution intent action. Use "hold" for a visible no-trade decision or "target-position" to author/reshape the target position for this tick.

side.description: Optional target side override for action="target-position". Allowed values: long, short, flat.

targetFraction.description: Optional target notional fraction override for action="target-position". Still constrained by code-owned safety caps.

leverage.description: Optional non-negative integer leverage override for action="target-position". Still constrained by code-owned safety caps.

orderStyle.description: Optional execution order style. Allowed values: "ioc" or "gtc".

rationale.description: Required non-empty rationale for the explicit agent-authored intent.

intent.description: Optional explicit agent-authored execution intent preview. intent.action and intent.rationale are required when intent is provided.

tools.name: execute_tick
tools.description: Run a single one-shot trading tick. Reconciles state, fetches suggestions, evaluates policy, and executes. Optional slotId/intent fields let the agent preview or direct execution while preserving code-owned safety caps and validated order styles.

slotId.description: Optional canonical tick slot override (hh:30 UTC).

action.description: Required explicit execution intent action. Use "hold" for a visible no-trade decision or "target-position" to author/reshape the target position for this tick.

side.description: Optional target side override for action="target-position". Allowed values: long, short, flat.

targetFraction.description: Optional target notional fraction override for action="target-position". Still constrained by code-owned safety caps.

leverage.description: Optional non-negative integer leverage override for action="target-position". Still constrained by code-owned safety caps.

orderStyle.description: Optional execution order style. Allowed values: "ioc" or "gtc".

rationale.description: Required non-empty rationale for the explicit agent-authored intent.

intent.description: Optional explicit agent-authored execution intent. intent.action and intent.rationale are required when intent is provided.

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Return current trading status snapshot: daemonStatus, lastExecutedSlot, lastSuggestionId, exchangeActivity, haltReason, currentSlot, network, walletBackup, tradingSelection, liveTradingConsent, and fundingReadiness. Returns bootstrap guidance when runtime state has not been initialized yet.

tools.name: get_trade_history
tools.description: Read recent execution audit entries from the NDJSON log. Entries include retry and reshaping metadata when applicable.

limit.description: Max entries to return. Omit or 0 for all.

tools.name: acknowledge_live_trading
tools.description: Acknowledge acceptance of live mainnet trading risks. Required once before the first mainnet start_trading call. Persisted in runtime state and survives restarts.

confirmed.description: Must be true to acknowledge live trading risks.

tools.name: get_trading_options
tools.description: Return available trading axes from the cached agents.md catalog: models, strategies, pairs, and the recommended {pair, strategy, model} triplet. Use set_trading_selection to choose one of each.

tools.name: set_trading_selection
tools.description: Set or change the persisted trading selection by picking one pair, one strategy, and one model from the cached agents.md catalog. Validates each axis and persists the combined selection in runtime state for restart-safe behavior.

pair.description: Pair symbol (e.g. BTC-PERP) from the agents.md catalog pairs list.

strategy.description: Strategy profile (one of aggressive, balanced, conservative) from the agents.md catalog strategies list.

model.description: Model name from the agents.md catalog models list.

tools.name: accept_override_phrase
tools.description: Accept the override phrase to permit over-cap bridge decisions. Persisted in runtime state and survives restarts. Use reset_override_phrase to revoke.

confirmed.description: Must be true to accept the override phrase.

tools.name: cleanup_mnemonic_file
tools.description: Archive or permanently delete the local mnemonic file after backup has been confirmed. Requires walletBackup.status to be confirmed. Updates persisted backup lifecycle status.

action.description: Either "archive" (rename with timestamp suffix) or "delete" (permanent removal).
